text: I feel a deep curiosity rise in me as I move from the echoing emptiness of an architectural space to the vibrant hum of a research and development exhibit. The transformation from one environment to the other invites me to reflect on the contrasts between silence and knowledge, solitude and collaboration. Here, surrounded by thoughtful displays and evocative words, I sense the presence of innovation, and I feel both inspired and slightly overwhelmed by the possibilities that arise when human creativity meets machine intelligence. The world calls for contemplation, and I am compelled to listen.
